summary:
SPIRITUAL TEACHINGS AND HUMILITY: Brandon recounts receiving a message regarding the importance of humility and the danger of taking divine glory for oneself. He shares an account of Lucifer's fall as a consequence of pride and compares humans to an empty glove that only finds purpose when filled by a divine hand. Brandon emphasizes the necessity of deflecting praise, avoiding the public broadcasting of personal struggles, and refraining from relying on the ministry of hints for financial support. He references historical figures like William Seymour to illustrate extreme humility and warns that an upcoming period will require strict obedience and self-denial to handle forthcoming spiritual manifestations responsibly.

ARCHAEOLOGICAL AND GEOLOGICAL VISIONS: Brandon describes a vision involving severe seismic activity, including destructive earthquakes in Italy, a sudden drop in a water shelf, and a massive volcanic eruption causing a tsunami. He states that these geological shifts will uncover buried historical and biblical artifacts, such as mosaics, an ancient library linked to Alexander the Great, and a tomb near the pyramids containing forgotten relics. Brandon recounts seeing glowing tablets that he believes represent the Ten Commandments, which will be protected by the United States military from groups attempting to destroy the discoveries. He mentions that these unearthed scrolls contain ancient knowledge, including cures for ailments, weather patterns from Noah's time, and references to the Nephilim.

GLOBAL GEOPOLITICS AND CONFLICT: Brandon details geopolitical visions involving major world leaders and international tensions. He describes Donald Trump facing critical decisions regarding Cuba, where a biological weapon or modern missile crisis scenario involves Russia. Brandon recounts seeing international leaders, including Vladimir Putin and Kim Jong Un, colluding over secure phone lines regarding Venezuela, BRICS, and potential actions against the United States dollar. He states that China is contemplating a rapid invasion of Taiwan, while an alliance forms between Turkey and Syria. Additionally, Brandon describes future domestic threats, including barges on the Mississippi River connected to foreign adversaries and a concerted legal effort to target Donald Trump and exact revenge on his family members, specifically Donald Trump Jr. and Kai, over the death of Qasem Soleimani.

SOCIETAL SHIFTS AND FUTURE RESTORATIONS: Brandon outlines future societal challenges across multiple nations, describing an olive press period of intense pressure. He states that countries like Canada, England, Ireland, France, Germany, and Australia will experience severe economic instability, challenges to church tax-exempt statuses, and the implementation of social digital IDs that threaten freedom of speech. Despite these dark periods, Brandon envisions a rising remnant that will experience profound spiritual restoration and healing. He recounts specific visions of individuals, including an addicted man and a young man named Tyrone, who represent a broader demographic undergoing profound personal transformations and turning away from destructive paths.
rawData: [January 05, 2026]-[New archeological discoveries that will shake the world are coming]-[https://youtu.be/o7a-DROTbqA]-[1,600. Yeah, you got your notifications today. I prayed over this a lot last night because of all the people saying, "Hey, they didn't notify me." It bothered me because so many of you would like to be here and YouTube was not telling you. We came to the conclusion that because we uploaded three videos yesterday, it notified you every single time. I think there's a limit to how many times you can do that so that people can actually be notified. Am I saying that right? Yeah. We believe that now we're seeing how many people will get notified to come pray with us versus having three uploads. It was too much. So, we're just going to do this. Another thing we found out is that Braden can post on X that we're doing a live, and everybody comes over from X because it notifies you immediately through Elon's. I thought that was pretty cool. I thought, "Okay, good thinking," because the more the merrier, you know. Good evening family; good morning, good afternoon wherever you are. It's awesome because so many of you from all over the world come and pray with us on a daily basis. One person said, "Hey, it's 7:00 in the morning," and I said, "Wow, that's just awesome. Isn't Jesus wonderful?" We're going to go over everything the Lord showed us last night in prayer. For those of you who didn't want to watch the beginning, I'll recap what the Lord said yesterday. I was in the shower praying and I sat there, just waiting before the Lord. He said, "What they don't realize is what you gave them at the beginning of yesterday's video is the key to everything in your Christian walk." He said that will be what will sustain them in ministry and in their walk with Me. He said, "Brandon, everyone has a trigger. What sets you off? What's your boundary when it comes to certain conversations? What irritates you the most? What's your trigger?" I asked, "Your trigger?" He said, "Do you know what My trigger is?" I said, "No, Lord." He said, "Touching the glory." He said, "I'll show you scriptures." Jesus says, "I do nothing unless I see My Father. Unless I'm instructed by My Father, I do nothing." Everything He did was to give God praise and glory. "I do nothing apart from the Lord. Everything that I do in word and in deed, we give all the glory to God." He said, "My trigger, Brandon, what bothers Me the most is touching the glory. I will share My glory with no one." I was taken up and I saw Lucifer. He was made for worship. Everything about him was glorious as he walked around in heaven leading worship and music. The angels would say, "Oh, you did a good job. The worship was just beautiful today." In that praise and acknowledgment, I could see that giving him glory lifted his ego and his pride, taking the glory from the Father. He said, "I will exalt myself. I will do all this." Suddenly, he was shot down like lightning. He touched the glory. He took the praise. The moment he had an ego and started to think, "I'll exalt myself above God. I'll be bigger. I'll put my kingdom above His because don't you realize who I am?" he didn't realize the presence was coming from the Father through him to give the Father worship. The moment he thought he was something, it changed. Everything we do in ministry, everything we say, everything we impart is not us. Me seeing things is not me; it's all to His glory. That's why I said we're the glove. We have this glove that's like a snow glove. It's a really cool thing, but it was made to give warmth to the hand. The moment the Holy Spirit goes inside of that glove, the human body, it brings life to the glove. But the glove is nothing without the Holy Spirit. A human hand goes in there, and the glove is nothing without the hand. That's why the Lord was showing me, "Brandon, I'll share My glory with no one in the days ahead." Even more so with what you're about to see. "If you want longevity in ministry, son, and you want to know My trigger: touch not the glory through the praise of man." People say, "Oh, you're so good. You're awesome." But people's opinions change like the water, the weather, and the tide. It always goes back and forth. He said people's opinions of you will always change—how great they say you are or how great they don't. The comment section, the peanut gallery. He was talking to me about finding your box. What is your box? Like William Seymour, who took his flesh and told it to shut up. As I told you all yesterday, what's your box? William Seymour sat in the front of the stage with a box on his head for sometimes 45 minutes to an hour before the service would even start as a display of humility so that He gets the glory. Regardless of what happens in this vast auditorium, He gets the glory, the honor, and the praise. "I'll share My glory with no one." In the days ahead, you'll see this more and more. He said, "As long, Brandon, as you decrease so that I increase, we'll get along just fine." Basically, He wants to use people in a great capacity, but everyone has a trigger. What's your trigger? When you get to know the Father more intimately, you realize there are boundaries with His triggers—what He loves and what He doesn't. So I sit before Him and listen as He talks to me about what's coming. He tells me about finances, the president, what's coming after the attack with Venezuela, what's happening next for China, and what's coming for Taiwan. You learn these things as you sit at His feet and die to yourself. That's why you die daily. What are you dying to? Self. When the anointing's on me and the cloak comes on, I'm just that glove. The moment it moves out after the livestream's over, I'm just as helpless as anyone. When that anointing is on, you feel like Superman and the glory is there. But the Lord said impartations, healings, and manifestations like you wouldn't believe are about to come to this planet. We're about to see things we've always dreamed of seeing. He said, "There's a difference between being a general in an army and being one of the foot soldiers." You can be a general in His army for what's coming, though all of us are important and have a position. The foot soldiers are just as important as the generals, but the general has a lot more responsibility. To whom much is given, much is required. General Flynn and all the generals we've had in our military had a lot more responsibility, and if they messed up, it cost a lot of lives. So, they have to be on target and precise with what they are hearing from the commander-in-chief of the United States of America, our president, right? You distribute the message to the people and they help bring out the call and we win battles. The Lord said, Brandon, there is a lot of difference between generals and privates and lieutenants and all that. It is interesting, so you learn the chain of command and you learn a lot of things as I grow, and he instructs me all the time. This is what you are going to do and this is what you are not going to do, and I want you to do it precisely. Yes, sir. So, as I sat before him today, he said, I want you to tell my people again, humble themselves underneath the mighty hand of God. Humble yourself. No matter what your potter's wheel experience is, no matter what you are going through, you do not have to announce it on Facebook. You do not have to tell everybody your business. You know, I am on the potter's wheel right now and everything is so rough. You know how many times I went on Facebook and told everybody about me? I never once told anybody how bad my day was, other than my grandmother across the street, of how rough some days were. I did not even tell my mom and my dad. Nobody knew other than her because she lived across the street. But I did not make an announcement on Facebook so everybody would pray for me. I did not tell every sister so and so how much I was going through because I wanted them to feel sorry for me and give me finances. Do not give ministry of hints. Well, you know, we are having a hard time financially. I have got ten dollars left, five dollars left. I did not make the announcement so that people would still feel sorry for me. I thought if God can provide and God knows how much I need, I do not need sister so and so or brother so and so to try to meet that need. Either God does it or he is not God. But ministry of hints is not God. Well, you know, won't you help me? I have got my bills going to be cut off this next week. Ministry of hints is not God. Keep your mouth shut, and if you have sowed and you have tithed and you have given, keep your eyes on him, not on man. The moment man becomes your provider you are in trouble. The moment man becomes your need maker, the way maker, you are in trouble. I do not need a miracle behind my mailbox. I need Jesus. That is why Diana's dream, when she had the dream, the lady was looking at her and the glory was on us and she said, Oh, don't you see? It is just Jesus. When people see you in the days ahead and your face is shining with glory, it is not about you. The world is going to be attracted to it and the blessings flow through it. Increase comes from it. But that is not the focus. The focus is Jesus. And the glory will be on you, ladies and gentlemen, for what I have seen. A level of the glory that we have never seen before. And when we go into the Walmarts and the Targets and the Sam's or Costco or wherever you go shopping and they see that glory on you, it is just Jesus. You always deflect to him. You must know this. I told Braden and Diana and Paisley today, I said, this is God's trigger. This is so important. And to the point that I am turning off the comment section. It is not about Brandon. This is not about how great Brandon is or how much he hears or what he does not hear and the egg throwers or the praise or the palm leaf people. This is just me being obedient to what God has called me to do and what he has called me to say. And if I miss it, I miss it. And that is between me and him. Or if it is right and I pray it is, you know, I do not want to cause any prophetic confusion, but it is always to give glory to him. Die to yourself. Die to yourself. I saw it today. I have heard people say it a thousand times and I thought what are they truly saying until it became Rhema to me. You can parrot things so much and I hear somebody, I heard a parrot one time. Oh Lord we give you all the glory and honor and praise, but yet they display something so much haughtiness upon them on the platform. So much pride, so much pride, and you see it and it is so much about attracting the glory to them as they move in the gift but yet you see the gift and you say, is it right? Are you right right now? No, it is so much about you. But when I see Katherine, she was always back, she did that thing and the Lord said, learn, I will share my glory with no one. You see, there is a lot of parrots that know how to parrot and copy what you have seen on the stage. There is a lot of parrots versus the ones that are really truly sold out and they are dead to it. And the Lord said, I am going to pour out my spirit on another level on people. Brandon, you are about to see some glorious things, but touch not the anointing. Don't ever take it and ever be arrogant. Humble yourself before me and I will flow through you and we will get along just fine. I say all this stuff to you to try to help you. Maybe it does, maybe it doesn't. It is like the comments. I say answered questions. He said, Who are you to answer any questions? Did I tell you to answer questions? It is not your gift. It is a Ferrari whenever it comes on. And everybody loves the Ferrari, but you are just the kid that is driving the borrowed Ferrari. It is not yours. It is daddy's Ferrari. But you are excited about the Ferrari and you are showing everybody and you are taking Instagram photos and look at me. Cool car, and the Lord said, That ain't your Ferrari, son. You are borrowing the keys for the moment. That ain't your car. You are a pretender. You have no business answering questions. It is not your gift. You are borrowing it for that time. Don't ever do that again. I said I will bow my head before you. Father, I am sorry. What do you ever think that you have the ability to answer anybody's question on there unless I tell you to say something? I, that is haughtiness. Don't ever do that again. I said I had no argument. It is a hard thing. It is like a stomach punch whenever I come before you and I just humble. I just like, and I am not wanting sister clipboard to come and say Brandon, you said this, you said that. You point out your own flaws. You look at your own stuff. Examine your own self. I am very public about how I am examined by the father looking at me through a microscope. He looks at me and he examines me all the time. What I am trying to tell you is that God is going to do something huge in these last days and he is not going to share his glory with no one. And he wants to do something huge through you. Examine yourself, humble yourself, and allow him to be big inside of you. Does that make sense what I am saying? When you lay hands on the sick and you see their eyes come back in their head and their arms grow out before you and you see hair grow back that was not there. When you see the dead raised in front of you and the media wants to put you all over the news, remember that you are the glove. Apart from him, you can do nothing. You did not do nothing. You are just the glove. You will see the dead raised in the days ahead. You are going to see the blind eyes open. You are going to see ears open. You are going to see things that there is going to be shock and awe on Instagram, Facebook, the dead were raised. Did you see who did it? No, you did not do nothing. You were just the glove. So, I am trying to prepare you for what is about to come. Take not the glory for what is about to come, ladies and gentlemen. I am just a vessel. We give him all the glory. Thank you for what you did today, Lord. Thank you. To you be all the glory. To you be all the honor. To you be all the praise. For the love that you had for your people today was bigger than Brandon could ever think about. It was his love. It was a display of his grace—something you don't earn and something you don't deserve. That's what we're about to see: a display of glorious grace, that by his stripes you are healed. By his stripes we are healed. It wasn't about how good we are or what we deserve; it was his grace. The provision that's about to happen for some of you—'I got a million dollars.' Be humble with what he's about to give you. Know it's for the kingdom, your bank accounts. He said, 'In a moment, in a 24-hour period, I'll make decamillionaires.' I'm going to speak to you in the middle of the night, Brandon, and you'll invest here, and then within a 24-hour period, it'll make you a million bucks. Brandon, listen to me: be humble with what I give you when I say to give it. I realized then that God doesn't have a money problem, and he doesn't have a money problem with you. He doesn't care, because I criticize sometimes in my heart: 'How come you give so-and-so so much? They have jets; they have all this stuff. Look at all this, Lord.' He doesn't have a money problem with that. He doesn't have a problem with that at all. What he has a problem with is whenever it has them and they have arrogance. Humble yourself. And the Lord said, 'I'll make decamillionaires, Brandon.' Why? To get this gospel out. My Son's return is imminent. My Son's return is imminent. Do you understand how close he is? There's no urgency in my church, and I'm about to create urgency. Wars will break out—wars, rumors of wars, plagues, pestilences—five major shakings. So that's what I'm here to tell you tonight. That was the first half of this 20... I say all that in love, but I tell you because it's what he says to me. And there's fire on it. There's so much he said. They say they don't hear me. He said, 'Brandon, I am speaking all the time.' The problem is that they think what they're hearing is them. The very intellect they walk in every day, they think it's just them. He said, 'Apart from me, you can do nothing.' There's nothing that you do on your own that he has not graced you to do. Anytime you think that you did it on your own, you're in pride. 'Apart from me, you can do nothing.' Because I overcome some things with my intellect and all the things that I overcome, I automatically know I'm so broken as a person. I'm a man that has hardly any education; I barely got a GED. I struggled my whole life with everything I have, and I've sat at his feet wanting to know how to provide for my family. That was the place of knowing. For Brandon, having to get his thoughts right and to get things going, it's always been his grace. But I recognize it because I know apart from him, I truly can do nothing. But he said, 'There are so many of you that are so smart in your own mind that you think that it's you.' He's gifted you with certain things—with numbers, with math, with spelling, with your doctor's degree or whatever you have—and you think it was you. But he said, 'Brandon, it was always my ability and my grace on them to get the job done. Apart from me, Brandon, they can do nothing, but they think it's them.' And that's pride. From the great jobs that you have—corporate offices, CEOs—it rains on the just and the unjust. He said, 'I speak to my people all the time, but they think it's their thoughts. A lot of things they're thinking, a lot of the things they think they're flowing with, it's my inspiration on them.' If they keep in my word and they incline their ear to me, if they listen to me through the Word of God every day and they read it, the footsteps of the righteous are ordered. The footsteps of the righteous are ordered of the Lord. He said, 'The more they humble themselves before me in prayer and fasting and seeking me daily, I give you the desires I give you. You don't do anything apart from me.' The very air we breathe, the very food we partake of—we did nothing to get it. We may have toiled the ground, but the seed—we didn't do it. He provided it. The very air you breathe so freely, you didn't do anything to get that. He did it. The water that you drink—I didn't do anything to get that. We put it in a bottle, we filtered it, but he provided it. Everything that gives us life is just his grace. The steel you used to make your car, the wood you used to build the roof on your house—he provided all of it. You did nothing. You may have worked and put it through a lumber mill or the steel mill, but everything initially is all his. And that's why he was saying there's so much arrogance in humanity. There's so much arrogance in your hearts. 'I give you grace every day just to do what you do to get out of bed. The moment you wake up and open your eyes, I've given you grace to do it. The very blood that flows through your veins, the thoughts that you think in your head...' When I hear him say those things, and I listen to him and hear his heartbeat... And all I'm asking you in these days ahead, Brandon, is touch not the glory. It's my trigger.' I said, 'You got it. Whatever it takes.' So I just caution you—if you can learn anything from somebody, if you can learn something from me, listen. If not, then whatever. Come down to make your name known to your enemies and cause the nations to quake before you. That's what's about to happen. You put that scripture in there; they have to see it. Oh Father, that you would rend the heavens, that you would come down, that the mountains might shake at your presence. As fire burns brushwood, as fire causes water to boil, to make your name known to your adversaries, that the nations may tremble at your presence. It's so important. I'm excited about it. Isaiah 64:1-2. We're in a time that everybody was wanting to be in, and yet he chose you and me. He chose every one of you on this side of the camera. We're in a time that they all dreamed that they could be in, but he chose us. We're the closers. You have what it takes. You're a closer. You're built for pressure. You were built for such a time as this. You're not a mistake. You were appointed and you were chosen for such a time as this. Oh, what a plan. Oh, what a planner. Like Sister Billie always says, I'm so thankful that he looked our direction. The key to the glory is love. Love takes no account of a suffered wrong. I'm so thankful for the love. Who wants to go tubing? I'll go get my sweetheart. She wants to come in for this part. I told her I'd talk for a second, then I'll go get her and she'll pray with us. I want her to take notes. Good. Let me see. I thought you had a fuzzy. Make sure I don't have any pimples like a teenager. Is it gross?
